pi_items.source: Verified from export_result.sh variables and task description instructions.
Verified from export_result.sh variables and task description instructions.
Matches the explicit instructions in task.json description ('Set the Rolling ball radius to 15.0 pixels.').

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real VLT Messier 12 FITS data from ESA Hubble datasets (Vcomb.fits, 2048x2048 float32). The agent must perform background subtraction with a rolling ball radius of 15.0 as specified in the instructions. The output FITS must be saved to /home/ga/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/m12_flattened.fits and the measurement results to /home/ga/AstroImages/core_isolation/output/measurements.csv. The verifier checks that the image gradient is flattened and that the CSV file exports the required mean pixel metric.
